languages.text:
All allied characters become {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Line Tracked{/g}. Their effects does not stack.
Permanently lowers Per by -10 and Eogann takes additional {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} Shock damage with 30% pen whenever he's hit by enemy.

languages.text:
Все союзные персонажи получают {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}линию поддержки{/g}. Не суммируется.
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятие{/g} Эоганна навсегда снижается на −10. Когда противник {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадает{/g} по нему, Эоганн дополнительно получает {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.

languages.text:
Todos los personajes aliados ganan {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}línea de apoyo{/g}. Este efecto no es acumulativo.
La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} de Eogunn se reduce en −10 de manera permanente. Cada vez que un enemigo le {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacte{/g}, sufre {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional con un 30 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.

languages.text:
Alle verbündeten Charaktere erhalten {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Unterstützungslinie{/g}. Nicht stapelbar.
Eogunns {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} wird dauerhaft um −10 reduziert. Fügt ihm ein Gegner einen {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g} zu, erleidet er zusätzlich {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 30 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.

languages.text:
Tüm dost karakterler, {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}destek hattı{/g} kazanır. Etki üst üste birikmez.
Eogunn'un {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} niteliği kalıcı olarak 10 puan azalır. Eogunn, bir düşman ona {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurduğunda{/g} %30 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip ilave {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text:
Tous les personnages alliés bénéficient de {g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}Ligne de soutien{/g}. Non cumulable.
La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} d'Eogunn est réduite de −10 de façon permanente. Lorsqu'un ennemi le {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touche{/g}, il subit {uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} supplémentaires avec 30 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.

所有盟友获得{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援阵线{/g}。不可叠加。
伊奥贡的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}永久降低10。每当伊奥贡被敌人{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}，他额外受到附带30%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。

すべての味方キャラクターが{g|f:bee0d96b40b84f5da78bc3c9f41ec1fa}支援線{/g}を得る。スタックしない。
エオガンの{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}が永続的に−10減少する。敵が彼に{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}するたびに、彼は追加で{uip|Damage|288d109443a6496592a9b14b88993522}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を30%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で受ける。
